name: Gift of the Metallic Dragon
description: You learn the cure wounds spell and can cast it once per long rest without a spell slot, or using your own slots, using Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma. Additionally, as a reaction when you or a creature within 5 feet is hit by an attack, you can grant a bonus to AC equal to your proficiency bonus for that attack. You can use this reaction a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus per long rest.
